task_completion.description: Configure a Parametric Run named 'Low-E Retrofit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the eQUEST 'Parametric Runs' dialog or project tree showing a new run explicitly named 'Low-E Retrofit'.

task_completion.description: Modify glass types by setting SHADING-COEF to 0.35 in the parametric run.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the parametric run variables/components dialog showing the Shading Coefficient (or SHADING-COEF) set to 0.35 (allowable tolerance +/- 0.02) for the glass types.

task_completion.description: Modify glass types by setting GLASS-CONDUCTANCE to 0.28 in the parametric run.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the parametric run variables/components dialog showing the Glass Conductance (or GLASS-CONDUCTANCE) set to 0.28 (allowable tolerance +/- 0.02) for the glass types.

task_completion.description: Execute the simulation for both the baseline and the 'Low-E Retrofit' run.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the eQUEST simulation calculation dialog showing progress or completion for both the baseline design and the 'Low-E Retrofit' run, or a results screen displaying output for both runs.
Look for the 'File -> Save' menu action being clicked, a save confirmation dialog, or the main window indicating the project has been saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the eQUEST GUI to configure the parametric run.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the eQUEST graphical user interface (dialog boxes, menus) rather than a text editor modifying the .inp file directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the simulation in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The eQUEST simulation progress bar or calculation window should be visible, indicating the engine is genuinely processing the runs.

integrity.description: The baseline design was not overwritten.
integrity.visual_evidence: Modifications to SHADING-COEF and GLASS-CONDUCTANCE should only appear within the 'Parametric Runs' dialog windows, not in the main baseline component properties.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target SHADING-COEF is 0.35 and GLASS-CONDUCTANCE is 0.28 (acceptable tolerance is 0.02 for both). The 4StoreyBuilding model contains three glass types: 'Window Type #1 GT', 'Window Type #2 GT', and 'Door Type #1 GT'. The agent must modify these parameters using the Parametric Runs interface in eQUEST 3.65 to avoid overwriting the baseline model.
